testcase.name: test_TC_AddToBasket_01

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected not to be visible Actual value: visible Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-primary.btn-block").first 18 × locator resolved to <button type="submit" data-loading-text="Adding..." class="btn btn-primary btn-block">Add to basket</button> - unexpected value "visible"

testcase.failure: #x1B[1m#x1B[31mtests\page_44_9ad0\test_page_44_9ad0.py#x1B[0m:37: in test_TC_AddToBasket_01 #x1B[0mpage.goto(PAGE_44_9AD0_URL, timeout=#x1B[94m60000#x1B[39;49;00m)#x1B[90m#x1B[39;49;00m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE AssertionError: Locator expected not to be visible#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Actual value: visible #x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE Call log:#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-primary.btn-block").first#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE 18 × locator resolved to <button type="submit" data-loading-text="Adding..." class="btn btn-primary btn-block">Add to basket</button>#x1B[0m #x1B[1m#x1B[31mE - unexpected value "visible"#x1B[0m

failure.message: AssertionError: Locator expected not to be visible Actual value: visible Call log: - Expect "to_be_visible" with timeout 15000ms - waiting for locator("button.btn.btn-primary.btn-block").first 18 × locator resolved to <button type="submit" data-loading-text="Adding..." class="btn btn-primary btn-block">Add to basket</button> - unexpected value "visible"
